sections.title: A: Original word formation practice
sections.instructions: Use the word clue to form the best word for each original gap.

items.sentence: Mia prepared an original word formation task on Units 1, 2 and 3. Complete the gaps in order during the class project: (1) ......, (2) ......, (3) ......, (4) ......, (5) ......, (6) ......, (7) ......, (8) .......
items.answer: collection, singers, children, player, musicians, collectors, entertainment, childhood

sections.title: C: Original key word transformation practice
sections.instructions: Complete the second sentence so that it keeps the same meaning as the first.

items.sentence:
Mia began the class project before the lesson on Units 1, 2 and 3. **CRAZY**
The class project ...... before the lesson on Units 1, 2 and 3.

Leo began the study group before the lesson on Units 1, 2 and 3. **WAS**
The study group ...... before the lesson on Units 1, 2 and 3.

Sara began the exam workshop before the lesson on Units 1, 2 and 3. **FEEL**
The exam workshop ...... before the lesson on Units 1, 2 and 3.

Tom began the online lesson before the lesson on Units 1, 2 and 3. **PART**
The online lesson ...... before the lesson on Units 1, 2 and 3.
